test_results.warnings: Non-fatal ARN parsing warnings for list_stream_consumers when no streams exist

fixes_applied.issue: Missing on_error handling for list_stream_consumers discovery
fixes_applied.fix: Added on_error: continue to handle cases where StreamARN might be invalid

known_limitations.limitation: Kinesis API doesn't expose consumer permissions directly. Permissions are managed through IAM policies, not through the consumer object. Current check validates consumer exists and is active as a proxy.
known_limitations.impact: Cannot directly validate least privilege permissions through API

known_limitations.limitation: Kinesis consumers always require authentication (IAM). Current check validates consumer is ACTIVE as a proxy for authentication requirement.
known_limitations.impact: Low - authentication is always required, so ACTIVE status is reasonable proxy

known_limitations.limitation: Kinesis Data Streams doesn't support VPC endpoints or private networking in the same way as other AWS services. Current check validates stream exists and is active with enhanced monitoring as a proxy.
known_limitations.impact: Cannot directly validate private network configuration - Kinesis doesn't support this feature

known_limitations.limitation: Kinesis consumers always require authentication (IAM). Current check validates ConsumerCount > 0 as a proxy for authentication requirement.
known_limitations.impact: Low - authentication is always required, so consumer presence is reasonable proxy

recommendations.description: Fix 1 rule(s) with configuration validation issues
recommendations.impact: HIGH - Ensures rules correctly validate compliance requirements

critical_issues.description: Rule checks ConsumerARN exists which may be redundant in array iteration context
critical_issues.problem: Rule checks ConsumerARN exists which may be redundant in array iteration context
critical_issues.impact: LOW - Redundant check but doesn't break functionality
critical_issues.recommendation: Remove redundant check for code clarity

critical_issues.description: Rule checks StreamARN exists and EnhancedMonitoring not_equals [], but doesn't check actual private network configuration (VPC endpoints, network isolation)
critical_issues.problem: Rule checks StreamARN exists and EnhancedMonitoring not_equals [], but doesn't check actual private network configuration (VPC endpoints, network isolation)
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule may not validate actual configuration correctly
critical_issues.recommendation: Review and fix field paths/operators to check actual configuration

cross_service_analysis.note: Note: All methods used are kinesis service methods
cross_service_analysis.explanation: All python_methods (describe_stream, describe_stream_consumer, describe_stream_summary) belong to kinesis service. No cross-service issues found.
cross_service_analysis.recommendation: No action needed - rules correctly use kinesis API methods
